/usr/bin/c++  -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/assignment_5B.dir/src/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/assignment_5B.dir/src/CS247_prog.cpp.o CMakeFiles/assignment_5B.dir/src/glslprogram.cpp.o CMakeFiles/assignment_5B.dir/src/vboquad.cpp.o -o assignment_5B  _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework OpenGL _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
